title: Explanation on Reis character and story
display_title: Explanation on Reis character and story
wikitext:
[]: Explanation on Rei's character and story             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Nov 04, 2007 10:59 am Could anyone explain to me Rei's character and her story in Eva. For example, what is her probelms in the series and is she overcomes them.

[]: Re: Explanation on Rei's character and story             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Nov 04, 2007 11:38 am The Goose wrote: Could anyone explain to me Rei's character and her story in Eva. For example, what is her probelms in the series and is she overcomes them.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Nov 04, 2007 11:48 am I don't know if it's reasonable to expect us to explain her whole character to you here, even if we could. But I'll throw you a bone.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Sun Nov 04, 2007 1:03 pm Why don't you watch the series? Rei's character is dealt with quite a bit, after watching the series, you have a pretty good idea about her.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Nov 04, 2007 1:06 pm Why don't you watch the series? Rei's character is dealt with quite a bit, after watching the series, you have a pretty good idea about her.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 04, 2007 1:30 pm There's an old ANF thread you can check out: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3774 and http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3762 any further discussion can go here

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Nov 04, 2007 2:59 pm Themes of NGE: Struggle with understanding the self. One's self identity. Often they refer the shape of the self, or in NGE it's about shaping the ego. It is revealed this process begins with the mother, who is the first other you have to shape yourself by. Rei is made up of half the soul of Lilith (mother of mankind) with the body/DNA of Yui Ikari (Shinji's mother). Later, it is somewhat widely believed that when she 'dies' her soul was transplanted into copies made from Lilith's body, but her shape still closely resembles that of Yui. What is this saying? That regardless of our own body, what's in our soul shapes our form. Rei has shaped her form through her contacts, and that's why she retains the same form whenever her soul is transferred to another body. Rei's struggles come from the fact that her soul is not complete. The other half of her soul is believed to be within Zerogouki. With the other Eva pilots they are relating to their Evas in a motherly sense - using them to shape themselves. But with Rei, her Eva is literally her other half, and this carries a lot of thematic and metaphorical significance. Rei does not understand who she is because she is, in a sense, only half of a soul - and again this is another strong metaphor to the problems the other pilots are facing. Further, Rei is linked to both Lilith and Yui - the two main "mother figures". This "Divinity Trinity" is a theme that relates back to the motherhood concept, and is one explanation for the two Rei bookmarks (the two mothers watching over Shinji). Ok, I rambled all of that off pretty quickly. There's a lot more relevant information, but I'll leave it there for now. Overall, I think Rei is a brilliant symbolic/metaphoric device if understood properly. She echoes almost every major theme in the series in a literal sense.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Nov 04, 2007 3:03 pm There's an old ANF thread you can check out: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3774 and http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3762 any further discussion can go here

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Nov 04, 2007 5:06 pm She "chose" Shinji over Gendo, and she "chose" to allow Shinji the choice of what future he wanted. Those were conscious choices she made of her own volition.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 04, 2007 5:54 pm btw, I went through Reichu's thread and fixed all the links and images (except for the "gendofloor.jpg" which I have no idea), would have been mega annoying if it wasn't for the commentary page that tells me the cut# mappings between episodes. Some of them are still a best guess fix though.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 04, 2007 6:09 pm Ornette wrote: except for the "gendofloor.jpg" which I have no idea

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Nov 04, 2007 6:19 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Ornette wrote: except for the "gendofloor.jpg" which I have no idea

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Sun Nov 04, 2007 6:20 pm I was reading Reichu's 2nd thread that she linked, and I had a thought. In the instant that Rei was returned to Lilith, couldn't both of them have been conscious? If indeed Lilith's entire soul was in Rei, when Rei returned to Lilith, there would have been the instant where both were conscious, before Lilith began Pre-3I. Thus, the following is fine. Rei: ただいま｡　（TADAIMA)　　（I'm back) Lilith:　おかえりなさい。　（OKAERINASAI)　（Welcome　home)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Nov 04, 2007 7:29 pm Shiro wrote: I was reading Reichu's 2nd thread that she linked, and I had a thought. In the instant that Rei was returned to Lilith, couldn't both of them have been conscious? If indeed Lilith's entire soul was in Rei, when Rei returned to Lilith, there would have been the instant where both were conscious, before Lilith began Pre-3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Nov 04, 2007 7:31 pm Standard assumtion is Rei became part of the whole that is Lilith, a very important part at that. By this point it doesn't matter which name you use as both are accurate.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Nov 04, 2007 8:02 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: By this point it doesn't matter which name you use as both are accurate.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Nov 04, 2007 8:33 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: The interesting thing about the following scene - up to when GNR rises through the clouds to get Shinji - is that it very much seems that Rei has almost disappeared into Lilith's consciousness. Notice the red eyes which echo the eyes of the "Rei Angel" produced by Armisael in 23' (the one that reaches out to Shogouki/Shinji). I think this is a visual clue that Lilith has taken over as the conscious being, but then Shinji yells "Ayanami!? Rei?!" and all of a sudden GNR's eyes return to Rei's normal eyes and she gasps as if in recognition.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Nov 04, 2007 10:00 pm UrsusArctos wrote: I always thought Rei looked surprised when she opened her eyes again.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Nov 05, 2007 12:28 am Things a person named Fuzz E. Chickens from Trivial Being had to say about Rei: Fuzz E. Chickens wrote: Awesome things about Rei: Blue hair Angel superpowers Willing to sacrifice herself for others, even against orders Megumi's voice Angel superpowers Blue Eva Knows more about NERV's secrets than any other pilot UBER HAWT Angel superpowers Much more emotional than most fans give her credit for Did I mention Angel superpowers?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Nov 05, 2007 12:41 am Ol'Fuzzy is quite well known by most of the old timers. Luckily he was gone well before my time since I doubt I could've dealt with him for very long.
